title: Build Your First Webpage
description: Create a personal webpage using HTML and CSS. Include at least 3 sections: header, main content, and footer. Use semantic HTML tags and style with CSS.

title: JavaScript Calculator
description: Build a simple calculator using JavaScript that can perform basic arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /). Include clear, intuitive buttons and a display area.

title: React To-Do App
description: Create a to-do list application using React. Features should include: add tasks, mark tasks as complete, delete tasks, and persist data to localStorage.

title: Data Analysis Project
description: Using Python and pandas, analyze a dataset of your choice. Include data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and visualizations using matplotlib. Submit your Jupyter notebook.

title: TypeScript Generic Utility
description: Implement a generic utility class in TypeScript that can manage a collection of items with CRUD operations. Include proper type definitions and JSDoc comments.

title: REST API Development
description: Build a RESTful API using Node.js and Express. Include endpoints for CRUD operations on a resource of your choice, proper error handling, and input validation.
